requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 Evidence for Samoa PV Inverter Projects
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——萨摩亚光伏逆变器项目的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——薩摩亞光伏逆變器項目的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據

summary.en: No Samoa-specific standalone EMC technical regulation for solar PV inverters has been identified. In practice, Samoa PV inverter EMC expectations are likely to be set through MCIL import documentation, OOTR / EPC electricity-project review, donor or owner procurement specifications, and IEC or Australia-New Zealand legacy references. Exporters should prepare IEC 62920 EMC type-test evidence for PV power conversion equipment and relevant IEC 61000-series harmonic, immunity, and emission reports for the exact inverter model and configuration submitted to EPC or a project owner.
summary.zh: 目前未发现萨摩亚针对太阳能光伏逆变器的独立EMC技术法规。实践中，萨摩亚光伏逆变器EMC预期可能通过MCIL进口文件、OOTR / EPC电力项目审查、捐助方或业主采购规格，以及IEC或澳新历史引用来确定。出口商应为提交给EPC或项目业主的具体逆变器型号和配置准备IEC 62920光伏功率变换设备EMC型式试验证据，以及相关IEC 61000系列谐波、抗扰度和发射报告。
summary.zht: 目前未發現薩摩亞針對太陽能光伏逆變器的獨立EMC技術法規。實務中，薩摩亞光伏逆變器EMC預期可能通過MCIL進口文件、OOTR / EPC電力項目審查、捐助方或業主採購規格，以及IEC或澳新歷史引用來確定。出口商應為提交給EPC或項目業主的具體逆變器型號和配置準備IEC 62920光伏功率轉換設備EMC型式試驗證據，以及相關IEC 61000系列諧波、抗擾度和發射報告。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emission, immunity, and harmonic-current test methods and limits where specified
MCIL import and business regulatory context for Samoa
OOTR / EPC electricity project review practice

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is often issued against GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic EMC test methods, with reports from CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. Although Chinese reports may use IEC-derived test methods, the certificate scope, pass/fail limits, grid voltage assumptions, and model-family coverage may not match IEC 62920 or IEC 61000 evidence expected by Samoa project owners, EPC, or financiers.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依据GB/T 37408-2021及相关国内EMC测试方法签发，并由CNAS认可中国实验室出具。尽管中国报告可能使用源自IEC的测试方法，但证书范围、判定限值、电网电压假设和型号系列覆盖范围可能不符合萨摩亚项目业主、EPC或融资方预期的IEC 62920或IEC 61000证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依據GB/T 37408-2021及相關國內EMC測試方法簽發，並由CNAS認可中國實驗室出具。儘管中國報告可能使用源自IEC的測試方法，但證書範圍、判定限值、電網電壓假設和型號系列覆蓋範圍可能不符合薩摩亞項目業主、EPC或融資方預期的IEC 62920或IEC 61000證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates should not be treated as automatically accepted Samoa evidence. Provide IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 reports from an accredited laboratory, mapped to the exact inverter power rating, firmware, filters, and grid configuration. Because Samoa uses 230/400 V at 50 Hz while China uses 220/380 V at 50 Hz nominally, confirm with EPC or the project engineer whether harmonic or conducted-emission test conditions need Samoa-voltage confirmation.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不应被视为萨摩亚自动接受的证据。应提供来自认可实验室的IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000报告，并映射至具体逆变器功率等级、固件、滤波器和电网配置。由于萨摩亚使用230/400 V、50 Hz，而中国标称为220/380 V、50 Hz，应与EPC或项目工程师确认谐波或传导发射测试条件是否需要按萨摩亚电压确认。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不應被視為薩摩亞自動接受的證據。應提供來自認可實驗室的IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000報告，並映射至具體逆變器功率等級、韌體、濾波器和電網配置。由於薩摩亞使用230/400 V、50 Hz，而中國標稱為220/380 V、50 Hz，應與EPC或項目工程師確認諧波或傳導發射測試條件是否需要按薩摩亞電壓確認。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific and commonly mandatory through EPC, owner, donor, or financier technical requirements; no standalone Samoa PV inverter EMC certificate has been identified
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven for export; domestic GB/T EMC evidence is not automatically accepted as Samoa IEC evidence

source.publisher: Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Labour, Samoa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on a China-only GB/T 37408 EMC certificate for Samoa project submission. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 EMC evidence for the supplied inverter configuration, and confirm whether Samoa's 230/400 V grid voltage requires additional harmonic or conducted-emission confirmation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅依赖中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书提交萨摩亚项目。应为供货逆变器配置准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000 EMC证据，并确认萨摩亚230/400 V电网电压是否需要额外谐波或传导发射确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅依賴中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書提交薩摩亞項目。應為供貨逆變器配置準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000 EMC證據，並確認薩摩亞230/400 V電網電壓是否需要額外諧波或傳導發射確認。
